data.title: TeamHive Launches Free Team Effectiveness Indicator, Giving Any Leader or Team Member Instant, Research-Backed Insight Into How Their Team Really Works
data.description: A human resource technology platform, endorsed by the University of Newcastle, is offering its PLUS model diagnostic tool for free to teams globally. TeamHive unveiled the release of the tool on April 21, 2026, in Sydney. The platform's website is team-hive.co.

data.title: GEMI Investor Alert: Kessler Topaz Meltzer & Check, LLP Encourages GEMI Investors with Losses to Contact the Firm
data.description: If you purchased GEMI Class A common stock and/or securities within the period of September 12, 2025, to February 17, 2026, you may be impacted by a securities fraud class action lawsuit filed against Gemini Space Station, Inc. (NASDAQ: GEMI). The class period for the lawsuit spans from September 12, 2025, to February 17, 2026.

data.title: Sloane Scott, an Industry Powerhouse in Experience Strategy, Named PRA's Mid-South Regional Vice President
data.description: A seasoned professional and strategic expert has been selected to guide PRA's Mid-South region towards a new phase of innovation and growth. The company, renowned for its expertise in business events and destination management, revealed that Sloane Scott will assume the role of Regional Vice President. The announcement was made in Chicago on April 21, 2026. This move is expected to drive the region towards further development and expansion under Sloane Scott's leadership.

data.title: BioArctic publishes the Annual Report and Sustainability Report for 2025
data.description: In a recent announcement, BioArctic AB (publ) (Nasdaq Stockholm: BIOA B) revealed the release of its 2025 Annual Report, now accessible on the firm's official website. Alongside this release, the company has also incorporated its Sustainability Report and Corporate Governance Report within this publication for easy reference.

data.title: Quantiphi Wins 2026 Google Cloud Partner of the Year Award in Four Categories
data.description: In Marlborough, Massachusetts on April 21, 2026, Quantiphi, a leading AI-driven digital engineering firm, was named the Google Cloud Partner of the Year for 2026 across four specific categories. This accolade highlights Quantiphi's exceptional utilization of the Google Cloud platform for various functions.

data.title: DroneArt Show: Harry Potter™ brings a first-of-its-kind open-air drone spectacle to selected cities worldwide
data.description: A spectacular show will feature 1,200 drones moving in perfect synchronization with music to celebrate 25 Years of Magic. The drones will showcase iconic moments from the Harry Potter™ films. Viewers can sign up for the waiting list to attend the first announced event.
Trump is privately discussing canceling the trip altogether, one person said, citing Tehran’s unwillingness to concede to his demands on nuclear enrichment.

data.title: F&M Bank Announces Appointment of Shalini Singhal to Chief Information and Technology Officer
data.description: Shalini Singhal has been appointed as the Chief Information and Technology Officer (CITO) at F&M Bank.

data.title: Core Scientific aims to secure $3.3B for AI data center expansion and debt refinancing, transitioning away from Bitcoin mining.
data.description: Core Scientific has announced a secured debt raise totaling $3.3 billion aimed at refinancing current obligations and enhancing AI-focused data centers. This move demonstrates a strategic shift away from Bitcoin mining towards a focus on AI technologies.

data.title: Nium teams up with Coinbase, expanding USDC payments globally to 190+ countries, without pre-funding. #partnership #crossborderpayments
data.description: Nium has incorporated Coinbase's USDC infrastructure into its system, allowing businesses to clear cross-border transactions in more than 190 countries without the need for pre-funding. This integration provides companies with a streamlined option for settling transactions internationally.

data.title: Kevin Warsh under scrutiny for Fed Chair nomination due to ties to cryptocurrencies. Concerns over conflicts of interest and Fed independence.
data.description: Kevin Warsh, who has been nominated by President Trump as the potential Federal Reserve Chair, is encountering backlash due to possible conflicts of interest, such as investments in cryptocurrencies. Additionally, concerns have been raised regarding the independence of the Federal Reserve. For more details, follow the link.

data.title: Stellar (XLM) revolutionizing online value with blockchain, AI, and micropayments in $236B economy shift.
data.description: Stellar (XLM) is delving into the realms of blockchain, artificial intelligence, and micropayments, aiming to revolutionize the $236 billion attention economy. This move is set to disrupt ad-reliant models by introducing privacy-centric technological advancements.

data.title: Pet Partners Names Boo, the Cockatoo as 2026 Pet of the Year
data.description: A cockatoo named Boo from Smithfield, Virginia, has successfully raised over $33,000 to support therapy animal visits across the country. The fundraising competition lasted six weeks before Pet Partners declared Boo the winner on April 14. This significant amount will contribute towards facilitating therapy animal visits on a nationwide scale, showcasing the positive impact of animal-assisted therapy.

data.title: Cotality Named a 2026 Google Cloud Partner of the Year for Providing Data and Analytics
data.description: A renowned property information and analytics provider, Cotality™, was recently honored as the 2026 Google Cloud Partner of the Year for Data and Analytics. This award signifies Cotality's excellence in innovation, customer impact, and technical proficiency within the Google Cloud ecosystem. Cotality's exceptional services in the Data and Analytics Provider category have led to enhanced analytics and accelerated AI transformation for its clients. This recognition highlights Cotality's significant contribution to the industry's data and analytics sector.

data.title: Elastic Wins 2026 Google Cloud Partner of the Year Award for Marketplace Category for Data Management & AI
data.description: In San Francisco, Elastic, a Search AI company listed on NYSE under ESTC, recently won the prestigious 2026 Google Cloud Partner of the Year Award in the Data Management & AI category. This recognition, the fifth from Google Cloud, showcases the ongoing partnership between the two companies in aiding mutual customers in implementing Generative AI solutions. These solutions aim to bring about faster development cycles, substantial performance enhancements, and reduced operational expenses. This award underscores Elastic's dedication to collaboration and innovation in the tech industry.

data.title: Foresite Named 2026 Google Cloud Security Partner of the Year for North America
data.description: Foresite Cybersecurity, based in OVERLAND PARK, Kan., was recently honored as the 2026 Google Cloud Security Partner of the Year for North America. The organization's exemplary leadership in practitioner-governed, AI-enhanced security operations was recognized with this prestigious award. This acknowledgment underscores Foresite Cybersecurity's commitment to excellence in the field, showcasing their dedication to cutting-edge practices. This accolade marks a significant achievement, showcasing the company's success and expertise in the industry.

data.title: Harness Wins 2026 Google Cloud Technology Partner of the Year Award for DevOps
data.description: Today in San Francisco, on April 21, 2026, Harness, a prominent AI Software Delivery Platform™ company, disclosed their achievement of being honored with the prestigious 2026 Google Cloud Technology Partner of the Year Award. This award showcases the growing collaboration between Harness and Google Cloud in the realm of agentic AI innovation.

data.title: Franco-Nevada to Release First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: Toronto-based Franco-Nevada Corporation shared plans to disclose its first quarter 2026 financial results. The results are set to be released on May 12th after market close, followed by a conference call scheduled for May 13th at 8:00 am Eastern Time. Investors and stakeholders can participate in the call using the toll-free dial-in number: 1-888-510-2154.
